Hero.subtitle: Together we make a difference
Hero.title:
Heartbeat of Rural Tunisia.
Authenticity, Resilience, Building.
Hero.description: Association Blelma Dream bridges traditional heritage and sustainable development. We empower farmers, guide youth, and preserve Tunisian rural memory.

EventsList.title: Events and Festivals
EventsList.subtitle: Some of the activities and events organized by the association to revive heritage and develop the region

Impact.title: Our Impact Creates Hope
Impact.subtitle: Thanks to the efforts of the region's people and continuous support, we have achieved tangible impact on the ground.
Impact.stat1_desc: have directly benefited from our solidarity and agricultural programs.
Impact.stat2_desc: reviving rich customs and showcasing the equestrian heritage and traditions of the region.
Impact.stat3_desc: Growing partnerships to position the region on the path of solidarity tourism.

Pillars.title: Our Areas of Work
Pillars.subtitle: We don't just make promises — we plant actions that bear fruit for real development of the region and its people.
Pillars.pillar1_desc: Helping small farmers access modern and sustainable techniques for olive pressing, honey harvesting, and supporting authentic local products.
Pillars.pillar2_desc: Providing training opportunities and integrating youth into the cultural and economic life of the region to prevent exodus and build a resilient economy.
Pillars.pillar3_desc: Reviving customs and traditions through seasonal events and festivals celebrating equestrian arts, traditional attire, and local cuisine.
